languages.text: {n}Декабалус, закончив раздавать последние указания подчиненным, подходит к вам.{/n} "Лорд-капитан, от своего имени определяю ваши действия — помощь в победе над техноеретиками — как в высшей степени эффективные. Примите неисчислимую благодарность за содействие в разрешении возникших недоразумений — данного саботажа".

traits.locale_text: {n}Декабалус, закончив раздавать последние указания подчиненным, подходит к вам. Он явно доволен результатами боя. {/n}

languages.text: {n}Decabalus, after finishing issuing final instructions to his subordinates, approaches you.{/n} "Lord Captain, I determine your actions — your aid in prevailing over the hereteks — to be highly effective. Please accept my incalculable gratitude for your assistance in resolving the confusion — this sabotage."
languages.original_text: {n}Декабалус, закончив раздавать последние указания подчиненным, подходит к вам.{/n} "Лорд-капитан, от своего имени определяю ваши действия — помощь в победе над техноеретиками — как в высшей степени эффективные. Примите неисчислимую благодарность за содействие в разрешении возникших недоразумений — данного саботажа".

traits.locale_text: {n}Decabalus, after finishing issuing final instructions to his subordinates, approaches you.{/n} "Lord Captain, I determine your actions — your aid in prevailing over the hereteks — to be highly effective. Please accept my incalculable gratitude for your assistance in resolving the confusion — this sabotage."

Please accept my incalculable gratitude for your assistance in resolving the confusion — this sabotage."

{n}Decabalus, after finishing issuing final instructions to his subordinates, approaches you.{/n} "Acknowledgement: Lord Captain, this unit determines your actions to be highly effective. Please accept my incalculable gratitude for your assistance in resolving the recent... confusion."

{n}Decabalus, after finishing issuing final instructions to his subordinates, approaches you.{/n} "Lord Captain, I determine your actions — your aid in prevailing over the hereteks — to be highly effective. Please accept my incalculable gratitude for your assistance in resolving the confusion — this sabotage."

{n}Decabalus, after finishing issuing final instructions to his subordinates, approaches you.{/n} "Lord Captain, I determine your actions — your aid in prevailing over the hereteks — to be highly effective. Please accept my incalculable gratitude for your assistance in resolving the confusion — this sabotage."

languages.text: {n}デカバルスは部下への最終指示を終わらせ、あなたに近づいてきた。{/n} 「確認：艦長様、この部隊は貴方の行動を非常に効果的と判断しました。最近の...混乱を解決するのに貴方の支援を賜り、計り知れない感謝を申し上げます。」
languages.original_text: {n}Decabalus, after finishing issuing final instructions to his subordinates, approaches you.{/n} "Acknowledgement: Lord Captain, this unit determines your actions to be highly effective. Please accept my incalculable gratitude for your assistance in resolving the recent... confusion."

traits.locale_text: デカバルスは部下への最終指示を終わらせ、あなたに近づいてきた。「確認：艦長様、この部隊は貴方の行動を非常に効果的と判断しました。最近の...混乱を解決するのに貴方の支援を賜り、計り知れない感謝を申し上げます。」

languages.text: {n}Decabalus, astlarına son talimatları vermeyi bitirdikten sonra sana yaklaşıyor.{/n} "Lord Kaptan... Tekâfirlerin üstesinden gelmemiz için yaptığınız yardım eylemlerini son derece etkili bulmaktayım. Lütfen şaşkınlıkla bu sabotaj karışıklığını çözmedeki yardımınız için hesaplanamaz şükranlarımı kabul buyurun."
languages.original_text: {n}Decabalus, after finishing issuing final instructions to his subordinates, approaches you.{/n} "Lord Captain, I determine your actions — your aid in prevailing over the hereteks — to be highly effective. Please accept my incalculable gratitude for your assistance in resolving the confusion — this sabotage."

traits.locale_text: {n}Decabalus, astlarına son talimatları vermeyi bitirdikten sonra sana yaklaşıyor.{/n} "Lord Kaptan... Tekâfirlerin üstesinden gelmemiz için yaptığınız yardım eylemlerini son derece etkili bulmaktayım. Lütfen şaşkınlıkla bu sabotaj karışıklığını çözmedeki yardımınız için hesaplanamaz şükranlarımı kabul buyurun."

languages.text: {n}Decabalus termina de dar instrucciones a sus subordinados y luego se acerca a ti.{/n} «Lord Capitán, determino que sus ayuda contra los hereteks ha resultado sumamente efectiva. Le ruego que acepte mi incalculable gratitud por su asistencia en la resolución de esta... confusión. De este sabotaje».
languages.original_text: {n}Decabalus, after finishing issuing final instructions to his subordinates, approaches you.{/n} "Lord Captain, I determine your actions — your aid in prevailing over the hereteks — to be highly effective. Please accept my incalculable gratitude for your assistance in resolving the confusion — this sabotage."

traits.locale_text: {n}Decabalus termina de dar instrucciones a sus subordinados y luego se acerca a ti.{/n} «Lord Capitán, determino que sus ayuda contra los hereteks ha resultado sumamente efectiva. Le ruego que acepte mi incalculable gratitud por su asistencia en la resolución de esta... confusión. De este sabotaje».

languages.text: {n}德卡巴洛斯向部属下达完最终指令后走向你。{/n}“舰长大人，我判定您的行动，即在战胜异教中提供的援助，具有极高效率。请接受我的无上感激，感谢您协助解决了这场混乱，即这起破坏活动。”
languages.original_text: {n}Decabalus, after finishing issuing final instructions to his subordinates, approaches you.{/n} "Lord Captain, I determine your actions — your aid in prevailing over the hereteks — to be highly effective. Please accept my incalculable gratitude for your assistance in resolving the confusion — this sabotage."

traits.locale_text: {n}德卡巴洛斯向部属下达完最终指令后走向你。{/n}“舰长大人，我判定您的行动，即在战胜异教中提供的援助，具有极高效率。请接受我的无上感激，感谢您协助解决了这场混乱，即这起破坏活动。”

languages.text: {n}Après avoir donné ses dernières instructions à ses subordonnés, Décabalus s'approche de vous.{/n} « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, j'ai déterminé que vos actions... votre aide dans la défaite des héréteks... se sont avérées extrêmement efficaces. Veuillez accepter mon incalculable reconnaissance pour votre assistance dans la résolution des troubles récents... du sabotage. »
languages.original_text: {n}Decabalus, after finishing issuing final instructions to his subordinates, approaches you.{/n} "Lord Captain, I determine your actions — your aid in prevailing over the hereteks — to be highly effective. Please accept my incalculable gratitude for your assistance in resolving the confusion — this sabotage."

traits.locale_text: {n}Après avoir donné ses dernières instructions à ses subordonnés, Décabalus s'approche de vous.{/n} « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, j'ai déterminé que vos actions... votre aide dans la défaite des héréteks... se sont avérées extrêmement efficaces. Veuillez accepter mon incalculable reconnaissance pour votre assistance dans la résolution des troubles récents... du sabotage. »

languages.text: {n}Decabalus erteilt seinen Untergebenen letzte Anweisungen und kommt dann auf dich zu.{/n} "Lord Captain, ich stuft Eure Aktionen — Eure Hilfe im Kampf mit den Häretekten – als außerordentlich effizient ein. Bitte akzeptiert meine unermessliche Dankbarkeit für Eure Unterstützung angesichts der jüngsten Konfusion — dieser Sabotage."
languages.original_text: {n}Decabalus, after finishing issuing final instructions to his subordinates, approaches you.{/n} "Lord Captain, I determine your actions — your aid in prevailing over the hereteks — to be highly effective. Please accept my incalculable gratitude for your assistance in resolving the confusion — this sabotage."
